data.body: EPIC STATUS after this session: MERGED to main — the Critical has_llm_steps gate-bypass fix (188), the full 13-change remediation stack (202-214: bugs, gate hardening, reducer inversion, import-cycle guard, decompositions, dead code, the two 189 review-bot fixes), item 13 (config/reconcile/editor/batch_dispatch splits, 218-221), and item 14 (run_git/atomic_write/_reap/_lazy_load helpers, 225-228). ALL those child tickets are CLOSED. REMAINING (2): (a) item 9 part 3 / 9.3 facade-read reroute under ebd8 (lofty-flare-crest); (b) item 15 directory-reorg + TicketQuery under 6ae5 (toll-clock-tier). Both checkpointed for a post-release pass. Item 8 (allowlist governance) was REJECTED earlier (allowlist stays a record). Epic stays OPEN until 9.3 + item 15 land.
